summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TGSRTC EBMS features implementation. All new GCC billing engine components working correctly: KPI damages/incentives engine (§18), Fee/PK formula (§20), Schedule-S infractions catalogue and logging (§19), billing workflow state machine (§12), and configurable business rules (§9). Backend APIs (100% success rate) and frontend integration fully functional.
passed_tests: Admin login with admin@tgsrtc.com / admin123
Backend: GET /api/kpi/gcc-engine returns KPI damages/incentives with caps (Rs.306,573.75 damages, Rs.7,982.75 incentives)
Backend: GET /api/fee-pk/compute returns bus-wise fee/PK calculation (Rs.4,372,909.50 total fee, 8 buses)
Backend: GET /api/infractions/catalogue returns 13 seeded items (categories A-G)
Backend: POST /api/infractions/catalogue adds new infraction successfully
Backend: POST /api/infractions/log logs infraction against bus
Backend: GET /api/infractions/logged returns logged infractions with date filters
Backend: POST /api/billing/generate creates invoice with workflow_state=draft
Backend: POST /api/billing/workflow advances invoice through states (draft→submitted→processing)
Backend: GET /api/billing/{id}/workflow shows current state and available actions
Backend: GET /api/business-rules returns 27 configured rules across 5 categories
Backend: POST /api/business-rules upserts rules successfully
Backend: DELETE /api/business-rules/{key} deletes rules
Frontend: Sidebar has GCC KPI, Infractions, Rules (GCC) nav items
Frontend: /gcc-kpi page shows KPI damages/incentives with category cards and chart
Frontend: /gcc-kpi page Fee/PK tab shows bus-wise calculation table
Frontend: /infractions page shows catalogue with categories A-G
Frontend: /infractions page can add and log infractions
Frontend: /business-rules page shows 27 rules grouped by category
Frontend: /business-rules page can edit and save rule values
Frontend: All existing features still work (dashboard, billing, duties navigation)
CORS reads CORS_ORIGINS env var correctly
All 89 backend API endpoints (100% success rate including new TGSRTC features)
KPI Engine: Reliability (BF), Availability, Punctuality, Frequency, Safety calculations
Fee/PK Engine: actual≥assured and actual<assured band calculations working
Infractions: Categories A-G with proper amounts (Rs.100 to Rs.2,00,000+)
Billing Workflow: State machine transitions (draft→submitted→processing→...)
Business Rules: 27 seeded rules across kpi, operations, infraction, billing, data categories
